---
applyTo: "apps/desktop-backoffice/**, apps/desktop/**"
---

# Desktop Retail / Backoffice Instructions

- Treat desktop work as parity-sensitive and architecture-risky.
- Do not fake readiness with shell-only placeholders.
- Favor keyboard-first, table-aware, reconciliation-visible flows.
- Desktop should not read/write another terminal's SQLite file over a share.
- When building retail flows, preserve the same business semantics as Android even if interaction patterns differ.
